iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+tvOS 26.0+visionOS 26.0+

```
static var textDidEndEditing: NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<UITextView.TextDidEndEditingMessage> { get }
```
